compressed_context:
DEF: NATIONALLY-DETERMINED CONTRIBUTION(NDC)
CTX: EU-2030 CLIMATE/ENERGY-PACKAGE
CLAIM: PACKAGE SUBJECT-TO AMBITIOUS REVISION ENSURE ON-TRACK LONG-TERM-OBJECTIVES
REQUIREMENT: REPORTS ON KEY-CHANGES SINCE-2000 RECESSION ∧ GROWTH ∧ GEOPOLITICAL-EVENTS
OBSERVATION: COUNCIL CONCLUSIONS NOTE RISK OF CARBON-LOCK-IN [OJ:2010 H1/10]
REF: COUNCIL-CONCLUSIONS 817TH MTG ON CLIMATE-ACTION
REF: COM(2013)0165 2030-CLIMATE/ENERGY-POLICIES
TARGETS: GHG-REDUCTION=−40% VS1990 ∧ RENEWABLES=27% ∧ ENERGY-EFFICIENCY+27% BY2030
PRINCIPLES: AFFORDABLE-PRICES ∧ COMPETITIVENESS ∧ SUPPLY-SECURITY ∧ SOVEREIGNTY
POLICY-SPACE: MEMBER-STATES RETAIN FLEXIBILITY ON ENERGY-MIX ∧ CLIMATE-PLANS
HIGHLIGHT: PARIS-AGREEMENT(COP21:2015) ∴ EU SUBMITS NDC FOR 2020–2030
CTX: EU ETS PHASE4 (2021–2030); ALLOWANCES ∧ SECTORAL-COVERAGE ANALYSIS PENDING
